CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond, CSR#5292. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-15-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Each counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. (212)

Plaintiff Allstate Insurance Company'S Motion To Compel Responses To Supplemental Interrogatories (From Dept. 612, Per Recusal Of Commissioner Hewlett)
Off Calendar Apr-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Allstate Insurance Company's motion to compel responses to supplemental interrogatories is granted. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 7 days of notice of this order. The motion is not moot as there is no evidence that responses have been served. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $500 shall be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Responses To Supplemental Interrogoatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-03-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.

Laurie Stayton, Esq. for Plaintiff: Allstate Insurance Company.

After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Dean Alac and Dean Alac Construction as follows:

Costs $504.00, for a total of $961,519.96
